name: 乔丹·芒恩

last_movies.title: 法律与秩序 第二十二季

introduction: Jhordan Munn is a bi-coastal actor who has studied under Howard Fine, Margie Haber, and Anthony Mark Barrow at IDSA for over 5 years. She is known for her lead role as Billy in Pay Homage and her supporting in an upcoming Untitled Apple+ TV project. Jhordan received a BA in International law and Spanish from the University of Oregon in 2016. After graduation, she moved to Los Angeles and pursued a career in film and television. Jhordan is set to lead another Indie Project, as Jo, a practical woman faced with her wife's conviction that she has immaculately conceived a child. Jhordan is conversational in Spanish, is a professional photographer, a certified flight attendant, certified scuba diver, avid traveler, and lover of thrilling adventures. She loves a challenge and loves to take up new hobbies. Her free time hobbies include snowboarding, surfing, running, surfing, gymnastics, and hot yoga.
